name: Collins Co., Ltd.
summary: Collins Co., Ltd. exports sundry goods and garments to department stores, warehouse clubs, supermarkets, discounted stores, home centers, drug stores and importers, etc. worldwide. The company's products include tool sets and boxes/auto accessories, garden tools/accessories, houseware/kitchenware, X'mas decorations and lightings, sporting equipment/travel goods, small appliances/lightings, digital products/computer accessories, garments, and indoor and outdoor furniture, as well as BBQ grills, firepits, and accessories. It is also involved in the apparel retail business; biotechnology and medical care businesses; and provision of surface and storage products. The company was founded in 1969 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
